title: stachys andongensis
intro: Stachys andongensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the Korean woundwort, which is a type of herb native to Korea and parts of China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stachys andongensis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce swelling and pain, and treat various infections. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in traditional Korean medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
